chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI. C.P No. D-2417 of 2025 Date Order with Signature(s) of the Judge (s) For orders as to non-prosecution. 21.08.2025. Mr. Abdul Majid, Advocate for the petitioner. ************* Counsel for the petitioner, under instruction does not press the instant petition and submits that after amendment made by the Government of Sindh in SCNS, he will approach the learned trial court for his relief. The same is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Hyder/PS*
